_fixture.rationale: Phase H.T3c.4 — hapoalim LOGIN.FINAL last-good cookie-audit shape. Cookie names match the bank's observed post-login session set (cross-bank-contract-relevant). Values + domains fully PII-redacted: domains → '.example' reserved TLD; values → 'FAKE_VALUE'. Pool intentionally empty (LOGIN.FINAL cookie-audit consumes ONLY cookies — post-submit network captures live alongside in network/login-POST/ but are not asserted by this factory).
